message:
fix: resolve storage dashboard bugs (#7457, #7461, #7464) (#7476)

- PVCStatus card now applies global cluster filters so PVC counts match
  the StorageOverview card (#7457)
- Storage dashboard stat value getter now handles 'pvs' block ID so the
  PV stat card shows a value instead of '-' (#7461)
- PVCStatus failed count now includes all non-Bound/non-Pending PVCs,
  not just 'Lost' status (#7464)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
